en_US.设置看板娘的位置，可以是负数: Set the waifu's position; negative values are allowed.
en_US.未获授权请勿修改此地址；擅自修改可能引发法律问题，相关责任与插件作者无关。: Do not change this URL without authorization. Any legal consequences from unauthorized changes are not the plugin author's responsibility.
en_US.这个路径是 WebGLShader 代码的位置，请勿随意修改。: This is the location of the WebGLShader code; do not modify it casually.
en_US.是否记录用户上次选择的样式: Remember the user's last style choice
en_US.面页小于指定宽度(px) <br/>禁用看板娘:
Disable waifu when page
width is below (px)
en_US.由于看板娘大小不同，请自行设置：宽度 x 高度: Since waifus vary in size, set width x height yourself.
en_US.设置为 0 时，任何大小的屏幕都会启用看板娘: When set to 0, the waifu is enabled on screens of any size.
en_US.显示进入面页欢迎词: Show welcome message on page entry
en_US.待机动画延迟时间，单位为秒，默认值为30秒。如果设置为0，则禁用待机动画。: Idle animation delay in seconds, default 30. Set to 0 to disable idle animation.
en_US.待机时播放的动作名称（一行一个），不需要填写扩展名。: Names of motions to play while idle (one per line). No file extension needed.
en_US.由于提示大小不同，请自行设置：宽度 x 高度: Since tip-box sizes vary, set width x height yourself.
en_US.\"自定义新版模型路径\" 需要登录并付费后才能使用, 已自动恢复为 \"自行部: "Custom new-format model path" requires sign-in and upgrade. Reverted to "Self-hosted legacy models".
en_US.提高模型画面的清晰度，让边缘看起来更顺滑。倍数越高画面越清晰，但对显卡的占用也越: Makes the model look sharper with smoother edges. Higher values look better but use more graphics resources.
en_US.让模型的边缘看起来更平滑。关闭后边缘可能出现锯齿。修改后请刷新前台页面才会生效。: Smooths the edges of the model. When turned off, edges may look jagged. Refresh the front-end page after changing this option for it to take effect.
en_US.不启用防盗保护；如果您使用了云存储或不需要防盗，可选择此项。: Anti-hotlink disabled. Choose this if you are using cloud storage or simply do not need protection.
en_US.访客看不到模型的真实地址；需要先把模型文件下载到您的网站上。: Visitors cannot see the model's real URL. You will need to download the model files to your own site first.
en_US.插件会把当前模型及其用到的所有文件下载到您的网站上，下载完成后访客加载模型就不再: The plugin downloads the current model and all related files to your site. Once finished, visitors no longer load the model from any external URL.
en_US.两种下载方式：【自动】当有访客打开模型时，插件会在后台开始下载，首次访问仍由原始: Two download modes: [Auto] when a visitor first opens a model, the plugin starts downloading in the background; the first visit is served from the original URL, and the local copy takes effect after the download completes. [Manual] click "Download All" below or a per-row download button to start immediately.
en_US.本插件同时支持两套独立的 Live2D 加载链路。第一次配置前请先确认手里的模型: This plugin ships two completely independent Live2D loaders. Before your first configuration, decide which one your model belongs to:
en_US.V1（Cubism 2 / 3 系，如 22 娘、Pio、Tia、Shizuku: V1 (Cubism 2 / 3 era — 22-Niang, Pio, Tia, Shizuku, etc.)
en_US.V2（Cubism 4 / 5 系，官方仍在维护的最新格式）: V2 (Cubism 4 / 5 — the format Live2D Inc. is actively maintaining)
en_US.「自定义新版模型路径」（需登录并购买授权）: "Custom new-format model path" (requires sign-in and a paid license)
en_US.简单判断：清单文件名以 .model3.json 结尾就是 V2，否则是 V1。: Quick check: if the manifest filename ends with .model3.json it is V2, otherwise it is V1.
en_US.「API 方式」是 V1 / V2 链路的总开关，三个选项作用不同：: "API mode" is the master switch between the V1 and V2 loaders. The three options behave differently:
en_US.使用插件随包内置的 V1 模型，由本站 REST 接口（/wp-json/liv: Use the V1 models bundled with the plugin. They are served by your own site over /wp-json/live2d/v1/model/*, with no outbound requests. "Model ID" and "Texture ID" turn into dropdowns. Download the model first from the "Live 2D Workshop" page.
en_US.对接您自己服务器或第三方提供的 V1 模型 API（即 fghrsh 风格接口）: Connect to a V1 model API hosted on your own server or a third party (the fghrsh-style API). "Model API" must point to the root URL that returns model_list.json.
en_US.用于 Cubism 4 / 5 模型（V2，*.model3.json）。需要登: For Cubism 4 / 5 models (V2, *.model3.json). Available only after signing in and purchasing a license.
en_US.「模型 API」何时以 .json 结尾、何时以斜杠结尾: When "Model API" should end with .json vs. with a trailing slash
en_US.仅当「API 方式 = 自定义新版模型路径」时，「模型 API」支持以下两种写法: Only when "API mode = Custom new-format model path" is selected does "Model API" accept the two formats below. The trailing character decides which one is used:
en_US.以 .json 结尾（直链单模型）: Ends with .json (direct link to a single model)
en_US.直接当作 *.model3.json 加载，不再做任何路径拼接。例：https:: Loaded as a *.model3.json directly, with no further path concatenation. Example: https://cdn.example.com/live2d/haru/haru.model3.json
en_US.忽略，下方「模型目录」「待机动画文件名」两行会自动隐藏。: Ignored — the "Model directory" and "Idle motion filename" rows below are hidden automatically.
en_US.当作根目录使用，配合下方「模型目录」每行一个名称，自动按 {模型 API}{名称: Treated as a root directory. Combined with the "Model directory" list below (one name per line), the full URL is assembled as {Model API}{name}/{name}.model3.json.
en_US.必填。每行写一个子目录名称，名称必须与 {名称}.model3.json 的前缀: Required. Put one sub-directory name per line; the name must match the prefix of {name}.model3.json exactly.
en_US.补充约束：路径不能包含中文；HTTPS 站点的模型清单及其引用到的所有资源（.m: Additional constraints: paths must not contain non-ASCII characters; on HTTPS sites the manifest and every referenced asset (.moc3, textures, motion3.json, physics3.json, etc.) must also be HTTPS; if hosted on third-party object storage / CDN, enable CORS for your site origin.
en_US.「默认材质 ID」仅 V1 模型使用，V2 模型留空即可。: "Default texture ID" is used only by V1 models — leave it blank for V2.
en_US.「模型防盗保护（新版模型）」只对 V2 模型（自定义新版模型路径）生效，V1 模: "Model anti-leech protection (new-format models)" applies only to V2 models (Custom new-format model path). V1 models (local / self-hosted legacy) are served by your own site and do not need this layer.
en_US.插件不动您填的「模型 API」，浏览器直接拉源站。适用于您已经把模型放在阿里云: The plugin keeps your "Model API" untouched and the browser fetches directly from origin. Suitable when your model is hosted on Alibaba OSS, Tencent COS, Upyun, Qiniu, your own CDN, or any storage that already supports Referer / URL-signing protection.
en_US.插件会把模型涉及的全部文件下载到本站 wp-content/plugins/li: The plugin downloads every model asset under wp-content/plugins/live-2d/model/ on your site and exposes only signed, ephemeral URLs to the front end — visitors cannot see the origin URL even via DevTools. Suitable when the origin lacks anti-leech features (GitHub Pages, jsDelivr, self-hosted nginx, etc.).
en_US.选择「缓存到本地」后，下方会出现下载面板：可以「全部下载」一键缓存全部已配置模型: Selecting "Cache locally" exposes a download panel below: use "Download all" to cache every configured model in one click, or let the plugin lazily fetch on a visitor's first request. "Clean orphans" removes model files that were once configured but are no longer referenced.
en_US.在「高级设置」「提示消息选项」页面点击 %s 可以在同一个事件下追加随机语句，运: In the "Advanced settings" or "Tip message options" page, click %s to add another random sentence to the same event; one of them is picked at random at runtime.
en_US.以下事件支持在文本中插入特殊标记，运行时会被替换为对应内容：: These events support placeholders that get replaced at runtime:
en_US.鼠标悬停时的消息提示：{text} 触发事件的内容、{highlight} 高亮: Mouse hover tip: {text} the triggering content, {highlight} the highlight-style placeholder
en_US.鼠标点击时的消息提示：{text} 触发事件的内容、{highlight} 高亮: Mouse click tip: {text} the triggering content, {highlight} the highlight-style placeholder
en_US.节日事件：{year} 年份、{highlight} 高亮样式占位符: Holiday events: {year} the year, {highlight} the highlight-style placeholder
en_US.搜索引擎入站提示：{title} 网站标题、{keyword} 关键词、{web: Search-engine referral tip: {title} page title, {keyword} keyword, {website} site name, {highlight} highlight-style placeholder (refer to the defaults — not every search engine provides all of these).
en_US.访问本站点的提示：{website} 站点名称、{highlight} 高亮样式: Site visitor tip: {website} site name, {highlight} highlight-style placeholder
en_US.一言 API 的消息：{title}、{source}、{creator}、{d: Hitokoto API message: {title}, {source}, {creator}, {date}, {dynasty}, {author}, {highlight} (refer to the defaults — not every sentence carries all of these fields).
en_US.高亮用法：在任意 style 属性中插入 %s 即可，高亮颜色请到「提示消息选项: Highlight usage: insert %s into any style attribute; the highlight colour is configured under "Tip message options".
en_US.如需恢复全部默认值：删除插件后重新安装即可（注意会同时清空已保存的设置）。: To restore every default: uninstall and reinstall the plugin (this also wipes your saved settings).
en_US.「看板娘大小」「页面边距」「拖拽样式」位于「样式设置」页，调整后立即对前端生效。: "Waifu size", "Page padding" and "Drag mode" live on the "Style settings" page — changes take effect on the front end immediately.
en_US.「面页小于指定宽度禁用看板娘」用于在小屏 / 移动端隐藏，留空或填 0 表示始终: "Hide waifu when the page is narrower than" hides the waifu on small screens / mobile devices; leave it empty or set 0 to always display.
en_US.「模型切换方式」「材质切换方式」分别决定按下工具栏切换按钮时是顺序切换还是随机切: "Model switch mode" and "Texture switch mode" decide whether the toolbar buttons cycle sequentially or pick at random.
en_US.「超采样」与「抗锯齿」属于付费功能，仅对 V2 模型有效，开启后可显著提升贴图清: "Super-sampling" and "Anti-aliasing" are paid features that apply only to V2 models. Enabling them noticeably improves texture sharpness at the cost of GPU usage.
en_US.「Cubism Core for Web 引用地址」一般保留默认（指向插件随包分: "Cubism Core for Web URL" is best left at the default value (pointing to the bundled 6.x local copy). Avoid switching to a CDN unless you know what you're doing — the official CDN is still on 5.1.0 and is incompatible with the bundled Framework.
en_US.本页面列出插件内置的 V1（Cubism 2 / 3 系）模型，例如 bilib: This page lists the V1 (Cubism 2 / 3 era) models bundled with the plugin — bilibili 22-Niang / 33-Niang, Potion Maker Pio / Tia, Shizuku, and so on. Clicking "Download" pulls the ZIP from the author's origin and extracts it into wp-content/plugins/live-2d/model/.
en_US.已经在 live2dweb.com 完成账号登录，并把账号 Key 保存到「Li: Signed in on live2dweb.com and saved your account Key under "Live 2D Settings → Sign in".
en_US.已经完成邮箱验证（V1 模型下载本身不收费，但需要可联系到的邮箱以便接收授权变更: Verified your email address. (V1 downloads themselves are free, but a reachable email is needed for licence-change notifications.)
en_US.下载完成后，请前往「Live 2D 设置 → 基础设置」，把「API 方式」切换: After downloading, open "Live 2D Settings → General settings", switch "API mode" to "Local legacy models", and the model you just downloaded will be selectable from the "Default model ID" dropdown.
en_US.如果某个模型下载失败：先确认 Key 仍然有效（登录页会提示），并检查站点是否能: If a download fails: first confirm your Key is still valid (the sign-in page will warn), then check that your server can reach download.live2dweb.com. Sites with restricted network access can also fetch the ZIP manually from the origin and drop it into wp-content/plugins/live-2d/model/.
en_US.V2（Cubism 4 / 5）模型不会出现在本页面，需要在「Live 2D 设: V2 (Cubism 4 / 5) models never appear on this page. Choose "Custom new-format model path" under "Live 2D Settings → General settings", supply the model3.json URL yourself, and refer to the "Settings help → API mode and model path" section.
en_US.Cubism 4+（V2，官方仍在维护的最新格式）: Cubism 4+ (V2 — the format Live2D Inc. is actively maintaining)
en_US.「自定义模型路径（Cubism 4+）」（需登录并购买授权）: "Custom model path (Cubism 4+)" (requires sign-in and a paid license)
en_US.用于 Cubism 4+ 模型（V2，*.model3.json）。需要登录账号: For Cubism 4+ models (V2, *.model3.json). Available only after signing in and purchasing a license.
en_US.仅当「API 方式 = 自定义模型路径（Cubism 4+）」时，「模型 API: Only when "API mode = Custom model path (Cubism 4+)" is selected does "Model API" accept the two formats below. The trailing character decides which one is used:
en_US.「模型防盗保护（Cubism 4+）」只对 Cubism 4+ 模型（自定义模型: "Model anti-leech protection (Cubism 4+)" applies only to Cubism 4+ models (Custom model path). Legacy models (local / self-hosted legacy) are served by your own site and do not need this layer.
en_US.Cubism 4+ 模型不会出现在本页面，需要在「Live 2D 设置 → 基础: Cubism 4+ models never appear on this page. Choose "Custom model path (Cubism 4+)" under "Live 2D Settings → General settings", supply the model3.json URL yourself, and refer to the "Settings help → API mode and model path" section.
en_US.适用于 Cubism 4+ 模型，可填写模型文件的网址或所在目录，并在下方「模型: For Cubism 4+ models. Provide either the model file URL or the directory it lives in, and add multiple models in the "Model directory" list below.
en_US.Cubism 4+：登录并付费后可使用。: Cubism 4+: available after signing in and purchasing a license.
en_US.选择或填写默认皮肤 ID；Cubism 4+ 模型不使用此项，可留空。: Select or enter the default texture ID. Cubism 4+ models do not use this field and may leave it empty.
en_US.\"自定义模型路径（Cubism 4+）\" 需要登录并付费后才能使用, 已自动: "Custom model path (Cubism 4+)" requires sign-in and payment. The setting was reverted to "Self-hosted legacy models" automatically.
en_US.使用您自己服务器上的旧版模型接口,跨域,不走防盗链。: Use the legacy model API on your own server. Cross-origin, no hotlink protection.
en_US.模型存放在您自己的 OSS / CDN / GitHub Pages 等跨域位置: Models live on your own OSS / CDN / GitHub Pages or other cross-origin host. Visitors load the raw URL directly; you must configure hotlink protection yourself in the storage/CDN console.
en_US.自定义新版模型 · 托管到本站（Cubism 4+, 防盗链）: Custom Cubism 4+ model · Host on this site (with hotlink protection)
en_US.插件把模型文件保存到您的网站上,并对外只露出临时签名 URL,访客 F12 看不: The plugin saves model files onto your site and only exposes short-lived signed URLs; visitors using DevTools can't see the original address. Enter a cross-origin URL and click "Download", or just "Upload folder".
en_US.上面「API 方式」选不同选项时, 此处填写要求不同:: The fill-in requirement here depends on which option is selected for "API mode" above:
en_US.本地部署旧版模型: 系统自动指向本站, 无需填写: Local legacy model: automatically points to this site, no input needed
en_US.自行部署旧版模型: 填您自己的旧版 PHP API 根地址: Self-hosted legacy model: enter the root URL of your own legacy PHP API
en_US.自定义新版模型 · 直链加载: 填 .model3.json 完整 URL, 或: Custom Cubism 4+ model · Direct link: enter the full .model3.json URL, or a directory root (with trailing /)
en_US.自定义新版模型 · 托管到本站: 本行隐藏, 由系统自动指向本站 model/: Custom Cubism 4+ model · Host on this site: this row is hidden and the system auto-points to this site's model/ root. Fill the slug (= subfolder name) in the "Model directory" list below, or let the "Model hosting" panel append it automatically when you download/upload.
en_US.模型名称列表: 「自行部署旧版 / 自定义新版」两种模式下, 每行填一个 slu: Model name list. In "Self-hosted legacy" / "Custom Cubism 4+" modes, enter one slug per line (= subfolder name, must exactly match the {slug}.model3.json prefix). In "Custom Cubism 4+ · Host on this site" mode, the slug is appended automatically when you click Download / Upload.
en_US.单文件上限 %s（受服务器 PHP upload_max_filesize 限制: Per-file upload limit: %s (constrained by the server's PHP upload_max_filesize). Files over the limit are marked in red and skipped; contact your host or edit php.ini / .htaccess to raise it.
en_US.插件会从下面输入的 URL 抓取整套模型文件（model3.json + moc: The plugin will fetch the full model bundle (model3.json + moc3 + textures + motions, etc.) from the URL below and save it onto your site. Once done, visitors load the local copy instead of the external address.
en_US.填模型 .model3.json 完整 URL,点击「下载到本站」。下载完成后,: Enter the model's full .model3.json URL and click "Download to this site". After the download finishes, the model's slug (= folder name) is appended to the "Model directory" list above automatically, no manual entry needed.
en_US.如果模型文件只在您本地（没有公网 URL）,可以直接拖拽整个模型文件夹到这里,或: If the model files only live on your local machine (no public URL), drag the whole folder here, or click the button below to pick one. Files are saved at their relative paths under wp-content/plugins/live-2d/model/{slug}/.
en_US.「自定义新版模型 · 直链加载」或「自定义新版模型 · 托管到本站」(均需登录并: "Custom Cubism 4+ model · Direct link" or "Custom Cubism 4+ model · Host on this site" (both require sign-in and a purchased license)
en_US.「API 方式」是 V1 / V2 链路的总开关, 2026-05 重构后由原三: "API mode" is the master switch for the V1 / V2 pipeline. After the 2026-05 refactor, the original 3 options + protectV2 toggle were merged into a single 4-option radio. Each option behaves differently:
en_US.使用插件随包内置的 V1 模型, 由本站 REST 接口 (/wp-json/l: Uses the V1 models bundled with the plugin, served via this site's REST API (/wp-json/live2d/v1/model/*). No outbound network calls. "Model ID" and "Texture ID" automatically become dropdowns. The model must first be downloaded from the "Live 2D Workshop" page.
en_US.对接您自己服务器或第三方提供的 V1 模型 API (即 fghrsh 风格接口: Talks to a V1 model API hosted by you or a third party (i.e. the fghrsh-style API). The "Model API" field must be set to the root URL that returns model_list.json.
en_US.用于 Cubism 4+ 模型 (V2, *.model3.json), 「模型: For Cubism 4+ models (V2, *.model3.json). "Model API" takes a cross-origin URL and the browser fetches the origin directly. Available only after sign-in and payment; hotlink protection is handled by you on the object storage / CDN side.
en_US.自定义新版模型 · 托管到本站 (Cubism 4+, 推荐): Custom Cubism 4+ model · Host on this site (recommended)
en_US.同上, 但插件会把模型下载 / 托管到本站 wp-content/plugins: Same as above, but the plugin downloads / hosts the model under wp-content/plugins/live-2d/model/{slug}/ on this site and handles hotlink protection for you (short-lived signed URLs). Available only after sign-in and payment.
en_US.选了「托管到本站」后的表单变化: Form changes after selecting "Host on this site"
en_US.选「自定义新版模型 · 托管到本站」后, 「模型 API」输入框会被隐藏, 系统: After choosing "Custom Cubism 4+ model · Host on this site", the "Model API" input is hidden and the system automatically points it at this site's wp-content/plugins/live-2d/model/ root. The only thing you need to fill in is the "Model directory" list - one slug (= subfolder name) per line; the plugin expands it to a full manifest URL as {root}{slug}/{slug}.model3.json.
en_US.仅当「API 方式 = 自定义新版模型 · 直链加载」时, 「模型 API」支持: Only when "API mode = Custom Cubism 4+ model · Direct link", the "Model API" field supports two forms, distinguished by the trailing character:
en_US.直接当作 *.model3.json 加载, 不再做任何路径拼接。例: http: Loaded as *.model3.json directly with no path concatenation. Example: https://cdn.example.com/live2d/haru/haru.model3.json
en_US.忽略, 下方「模型目录」「待机动画文件名」两行会自动隐藏。: Ignored. The "Model directory" and "Idle motion file name" rows below are auto-hidden.
en_US.当作根目录使用, 配合下方「模型目录」每行一个 slug, 自动按 {模型 AP: Treated as a directory root. Combined with the "Model directory" list below (one slug per line), full URLs are auto-built as {Model API}{slug}/{slug}.model3.json.
en_US.必填。每行写一个子目录名称, 名称必须与 {slug}.model3.json: Required. One subfolder name per line; the name must exactly match the {slug}.model3.json prefix.
en_US.补充约束: 路径不能包含中文; HTTPS 站点的模型清单及其引用到的所有资源: Additional constraints: paths must not contain CJK characters; on HTTPS sites, the model manifest and every asset it references (.moc3, textures, motion3.json, physics3.json, etc.) must also be HTTPS; when hosted on third-party object storage / CDN, make sure CORS is enabled correctly.
en_US.「默认材质 ID」仅 V1 模型使用, V2 模型留空即可。: "Default texture ID" applies only to V1 models. Leave it empty for V2 models.
en_US.防盗链只对 Cubism 4+ 模型的两个「自定义新版模型」选项生效; 旧版 V: Hotlink protection only applies to the two "Custom Cubism 4+ model" options. Legacy V1 goes through this site's REST API and doesn't need this layer.
en_US.插件不动您填的「模型 API」, 浏览器直接拉源站。适用于您已经把模型放在阿里云: The plugin leaves your "Model API" untouched and the browser fetches the origin directly. Suitable when the model is hosted on storage that already supports Referer-based hotlink protection / URL signing - e.g. Aliyun OSS, Tencent COS, Upyun, Qiniu, your own CDN (formerly protectV2 = direct).
en_US.自定义新版模型 · 托管到本站 (推荐): Custom Cubism 4+ model · Host on this site (recommended)
en_US.插件会把模型文件保存到本站 wp-content/plugins/live-2d: The plugin saves model files to this site's wp-content/plugins/live-2d/model/{slug}/ and only exposes signed short-lived URLs to the frontend; visitors using DevTools can't see the origin address. Suitable when the origin lacks hotlink protection (GitHub Pages, jsDelivr, self-hosted nginx, etc.) (formerly protectV2 = local).
en_US.选「托管到本站」后, 「模型 API」输入框会被隐藏, 系统自动写成本站 mod: After choosing "Host on this site", the "Model API" input is hidden and the system writes this site's model/ root automatically. The only thing you need to fill is the "Model directory" list (one slug per line). A "Model hosting" panel appears at the bottom with two tabs: Download from URL / Upload folder. After either action the slug is appended to the "Model directory" list automatically; click "Save settings" to apply.
en_US.2026-05 后取消了访客首次访问时的「自动懒下载」 (原为默认行为但不可见,: Since 2026-05, the implicit "lazy download on first visit" behavior was removed (it used to be the default but was not visible). The site owner must now explicitly click "Download to this site" or drag-and-drop an upload. "Clean orphans" is used to delete old model files that were removed from settings but still linger in the local cache.
en_US.Cubism 4+ 模型不会出现在本页面，需要在「Live 2D 设置 → 基础: Cubism 4+ models do not appear on this page. In "Live 2D Settings → Base settings", pick "Custom Cubism 4+ model · Direct link" or "Custom Cubism 4+ model · Host on this site", then either fill in the model3.json URL (direct link) or add one slug per line under "Model directory" (host on this site). See the "Settings help → API mode and model path" section for details.

ja.补充约束: 路径不能包含中文; HTTPS 站点的模型清单及其引用到的所有资源: 補足制約: パスに中国語などの全角文字を含めないでください。HTTPS サイトでは、モデルマニフェストとそこから参照されるすべてのリソース（.moc3、テクスチャ、motion3.json、physics3.json など）も HTTPS である必要があります。サードパーティのオブジェクトストレージ / CDN に置く場合は CORS を正しく設定してください。

ja.防盗链只对 Cubism 4+ 模型的两个「自定义新版模型」选项生效; 旧版 V: ホットリンク対策は、Cubism 4+ モデルの 2 つの「カスタム新バージョンモデル」選択肢にのみ有効です。旧バージョン V1 は本サイトの REST API を経由するため、この保護は不要です。
ja.自定义新版模型 · 直链加载: カスタム新バージョンモデル · 直リンク読み込み
ja.插件不动您填的「模型 API」, 浏览器直接拉源站。适用于您已经把模型放在阿里云: プラグインは「モデル API」をそのまま使い、ブラウザがオリジンから直接取得します。モデルを Aliyun OSS、Tencent COS、Upyun、Qiniu、自前 CDN など、Referer 防御 / URL 署名に対応したストレージに既に置いている場合に適しています（旧 protectV2 = direct）。
ja.自定义新版模型 · 托管到本站 (推荐): カスタム新バージョンモデル · このサイトでホスティング（推奨）
ja.插件会把模型文件保存到本站 wp-content/plugins/live-2d: プラグインがモデルファイルを本サイトの wp-content/plugins/live-2d/model/{slug}/ に保存し、フロントエンドには署名付きの一時的な URL のみ公開します。訪問者は DevTools でも元のアドレスを確認できません。オリジン側にホットリンク対策がない場合（GitHub Pages、jsDelivr、自前の nginx など）に適しています（旧 protectV2 = local）。
ja.选「托管到本站」后, 「模型 API」输入框会被隐藏, 系统自动写成本站 mod: 「このサイトでホスティング」を選ぶと、「モデル API」入力欄は非表示になり、本サイトの model/ ルートが自動で書き込まれます。サイト管理者が入力するのは「モデルディレクトリ」リスト（1 行に 1 つの slug）だけです。ページ下部には「モデルホスティング」パネルが表示され、URL からダウンロード / フォルダーをアップロードの 2 つのタブを備えています。どちらの操作でも slug が「モデルディレクトリ」リストに自動追加され、「設定を保存」をクリックすると反映されます。
ja.2026-05 后取消了访客首次访问时的「自动懒下载」 (原为默认行为但不可见,: 2026-05 以降、訪問者が初回アクセスしたときの「自動的な遅延ダウンロード」（従来の既定の挙動でしたが、画面上は見えませんでした）は廃止されました。サイト管理者が自分で「このサイトにダウンロード」をクリックするか、ドラッグ＆ドロップでアップロードする必要があります。「孤児の削除」は、設定からは削除されたのにローカルキャッシュに残っている古いモデルファイルを削除するために使います。
ja.Cubism 4+ 模型不会出现在本页面，需要在「Live 2D 设置 → 基础: Cubism 4+ モデルはこのページには表示されません。「Live 2D 設定 → 基本設定」で「カスタム新バージョンモデル · 直リンク読み込み」または「カスタム新バージョンモデル · このサイトでホスティング」を選び、model3.json の URL（直リンク）を入力するか、「モデルディレクトリ」に 1 行 1 つの slug（このサイトでホスティング）を追加してください。詳細は「設定ヘルプ → API 方式とモデルパス」をご参照ください。
